rosebunnypuppy.onlyfruits.ui.sellable-se: Configure the stuff that can be sold.
If enabled, meme items (like ch- ch- cherry bombs) will be sellable.
If enabled, items that should logically be fruits will be sellable. (Sweet-gem berries)
If enabled, items that use a fruit as an input will be sellable.
If enabled, artisinal items that are fruit-based will be sellable. (Jelly, Wine, Raisins, and Dried Fruit)
rosebunnypuppy.onlyfruits.ui.other-secti: Attempt to apply the cached prices for all items.
Attempt to apply the cached rewards for all quests.
rosebunnypuppy.onlyfruits.ui.questing-se: If enabled, quests that dont have to do with fruits will be doable, but will not reward any money.
If enabled, qi quests that dont have to do with fruits will be doable, but will not reward any gems.
rosebunnypuppy.onlyfruits.ui.quest-patch: Configure specific quests that aren't fully fruity.
Configure the potential crops for Lewis's "Crop Order" Special Order. Either disable money rewards or replace the non-fruity crops with appropriate fruity crops.
Configure the potential crops for Caroline's "Island Ingredients" Special Order. Either disable money rewards or replace the non-fruity crops with appropriate fruity crops.
